title: Section 16A
content: 1[16A.[Punishment for making demands of radioactive substances, nuclear devices, etc.] Omitted by the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Amendment (Repealing and Amending) Act 2013 (3 of 2013), s. 5 (w.e.f. 1-2-2013).]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 7, ibid., for Chapter IV (w.e.f. 21-9-2004).
